subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath created us and guided us unto the straight path. Peace and blessings rest upon the Guide of all paths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلقنا و هدانا الی سواء الصراط و الصلوه و السلام علی هادی السبل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
